title: Remove Fedora release number from task names
body:
With Renovate managing CI VM updates, when a major Fedora release happens, additional manual work is required to update the CI task names so they match the release number.  This is extra burdensome on maintainers, stop it.

Example Ref: https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/389

comments.body: @inknos PTAL when you get a chance.
@inknos would you mind giving this a `/approve` comment also?  Otherwise the merge-bot won't do anything.  FYI, same thing applies for most of the other containers-org repos.
looks like we need @jwhonce for approval here :)
